Ghoulbane  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Dismiss Undead (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 20
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Ghoulbane
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Dismiss Undead (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 20
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:33:00
Page Updated:Sat Aug 25th, 2018

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 28
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Ghoulbane
The Sword of Nobility
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Ghoulbane (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Class: PAL
    Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
    Yield: 1 x Ghoulbane

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Southern Felwithe
NPC Name
Joren Nobleheart

Upper Guk
NPC Name
The Fabled Froglok Shin Lord
the froglok shin lord

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Plane of Sky
Quest Name
The Fiery Avenger

The Overthere
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Southern Felwithe
Upper Guk
West Karana


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
Abysmal shin lord spawn rate.
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2023 at 5:22 AM Rating: Decent
Goregasmic
32 posts
Killed the Shin Lord PH 15 times and didn't get a single shin lord spawn. Thought people exaggerated how tedious getting that guy was but if the sword is rare, bring a bunch of books... my initial plan was to EXP on those guys so it wouldn't be a total waste but getting the decayed armor off the tae ews for the SK epic took longer than expected and when I finally got to upper guk, everything conned grey/green so no real point anymore.

Sorry Joren Nobleblade but I'll be knocking on your door soon.

Edited, Sep 8th 2023 6:24am by Goregasmic

It still drops from Joren Nobleheart
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2014 at 10:11 AM Rating: Decent
Bophed
14 posts
I can confirm this sword still drops from Joren Nobleheart . I went from level 25 to 37 camping the drop from the crazed goblins in Butcherblock, got tired went to Felwithe with my main and killed Joren Nobleheart . It is useless to try and camp the drops anymore. The sword is still useful though, as I went to Lower Guuk and the undead massacre was outstanding!

It still drops from Joren Nobleheart

# May 02 2016 at 2:27 PM Rating: Decent
Ombras
3 posts
Killed Joren Nobleheart 5/2/16 on FV server with 85 Mage. Logged in on level 1 Pally and looted both Shiny Brass Shield and Ghoulbane, since Sword is No Trade now on FV server.

Joren Nobleheart
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2013 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1629073938259
3 posts
August 7th, 2013. Took two minutes, went to Felwithe. Joren Nobleheart was up in the magician guild. 81 SK. Dropped him quick and bam, owner of Ghoulbane.
▲ Page top
Joren Nobleheart
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2013 at 3:53 AM Rating: Decent
Selarkersauzon
Sage
63 posts
SK lvl 57.
First, I decided to camp the Shin Lord.
During the 4 hours, I saw him only once and he dropped the Bracer. Then desappointed, I decided to go to Felthwith to find Joren Nobleheart.
I used the invis spell to cross very fast the Castle and get to the Magician guild. Joren is in the last room.

I fight him with a Cleric Merc. Jason is lvl 60, then was ytm. It was difficult to do him lot of damages, then fight was long. When he is about 15% , he started to run and then aggro the other guards which make fight longer. Dooming Darkness did not stunned him. Then I quickly zoned and went back. He was going back to his spot , healing himself - was already back to 50%. I succeed to stunned him this time with DD and finished him.
he dropped the GB and the Shield.

Really a quicker way to have the GB than the Lord camp.
____________________________
Selar
Anthem Guild
Tunare

▲ Page top
A Rusty Long Sword?!?
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2011 at 12:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591984046853
2 posts
Since SOE decided to take Unrest and turn it into a lvl 85 zone for a while, I decided to camp the Shin Lord for Ghoulbane. Been at it for 18 hrs now and have spawned the Shin Lord 14 times. With the exception of this last kill, he has dropped nothing but the bracer. I did get excited because I saw a sword in his hand and his loot table above only has the Ghoulbane listed as a weapon. Great disappointment when I went to loot him and found that he was wielding a Rusty Long Sword. So... Just a heads up to anyone going after this extremely rare drop, he does wield something different than Ghoulbane. Back to camping for me!

Ok... After another 7 hrs of spawning the Shin Lord and getting nowhere, I did some other reading and found a post concerning Joren Nobleheart in the South Felwithe Magician's Guild. So I went to see if it was true about him ALWAYS dropping Ghoulbane. I took my Shammy in and just mauled him down. Sure enough, Ghoulbane dropped with his shield! Now, after I had stopped laughing my **** off at the waste of time I spent on the Shin Lord, I brought my pally over and got the sword. By the time my pally got there, Joren had spawned AGAIN and had the sword in hand!

I should note, I wanted to follow through with the Pally quest to get the sword to begin with. But waiting for July 3rd for Sony to bring Unrest back to its normal level was not in my plans. I had already camped and gotten the other 3 parts for the quest. And since I will lose Ghoulbane doing the turn-ins for the epic, I will finish the quest to get the Ghoulbane anyways. :)

My advice, with the exception of the zone being changed for the moment, do the pally quest for the sword. Doesn't take long and is enjoyable.

Edited, Jun 25th 2011 8:09pm by Tyrathial
▲ Page top
Joren
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2007 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363689461
5 posts
Killed today with 62 pally ( me ) and boxed 55sk was still not what id call easy fight but did take him down on the first try not far off from 1.0 now just doin it to do it (and because picked up Book of scale for cheap in baz ) prob will never see 1.5 or 2.0 but it will be kinda cool to have anyway

Proc
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2005 at 8:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791407556
5 posts
haven't seen this posted yet. but as to the swords proc. it isn't as listed about. the proc now does 162-162. at least thats what the is says. hopefully as it says above 192 after 30 would be nice =)
▲ Page top
Joren
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2005 at 9:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592268285552
Scholar
149 posts
I went of felwithe with my paladin (lvl 70) and my druid 2nd box (lvl 59). I beat him but only had 14% mana left on the druid. Druid has crap gear. paladin about 8khp buffed (not alot of AA)

I would think a lvl 55+ cleric, paladin and perhaps one other DPS would have no issue with him.

A few notes :

1. There was a guard beside him. This guard DID NOT AGRO. You can fight the paladin without worry.

2. He didn't LoH himself while I fought him..but he healed...alot. It's best to wait until you see "Joren Begins to cast a spell" then hit your bash or cast a nice high lvl stun. That will stop him.

3. He ran at low hp. Snare stuck.

4. He hits pretty fast. And not overly hard..but hits alot so his dps is pretty high.

hope this helps...oh btw..

took me about 20 minutes from leaving PoK to looting to obtain my ghoulbane..this is the way to go if you can kill him.

▲ Page top
useful sitting on druid?
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2005 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793697396
View User Forum
383 posts
Many moons ago (like 4 years) this was not NoDrop. I had it sitting on my druid when it got flagged as NoDrop. Can it be MQ'd or anything? Or should he just destroy it?
▲ Page top
RE: useful sitting on druid?
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2005 at 3:59 PM Rating: Decent
Drazzminius
Scholar
188 posts
If it was not listed as "No Drop" or now as "No Trade" before a Nerf, then is should still be tradeable. Only items dropped after the patch typically include the change.
____________________________
Mikaal Drazzminius
Tier'Dal Necromancer
Necrotalk Admin
EQ Traders Super Moderator
EQ Magelo Advisor/Moderator
Rodcet Nife by Birth / Quellious by Merger / Povar by Re-Merger

QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2005 at 9:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
From the quest writeup.

Quote:
2) The Blessing of Sacrifice: You need a high faction with Akera, who is a Deepwater. Give him Ghoulbane to receive Inte's Second Blessing, the blessing of sacrifice.


If you have the faction to get Inte's Blessing, you should be ablt to turn the blessing in, for MQ.

And ALL ghoulbanes are no drop. I had one on my druid when they were nerfed, and it became no drop.

# Jun 23 2004 at 2:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759294285
126 posts
Corrupted Ghoulbane has the same stats as the Ghoulbane, but is tagged as SHD only.

It's a part of the Shadowknight Epic, but of course is obsolete by the time you get it. This applies to the Epic itself too, of course.

Almost there
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2004 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800913072
Scholar
329 posts
I have the heart, blade, and hilt. Tonight, with any luck, I will be getting the scroll. It has taken 3 days to get these items. First place I stopped was Unrest, and was unlucky, but I wasn't playing long. I spent the majority of my Valentine's Evening hunting the gobs in BB until the blade finally dropped. Went to Najena last night, and received it after about 5 hours (along with a level and a half.) From there, went back to unrest, and it dropped on the 3rd ghoul we fought.

So far, great quest, great item - Highly Reccomended.

Thoryndar BriteBlayde
Paladin of the 21st Order
